entries.definition:
ʿ–r–j–n type of truffle; date-palm stalk, dry date-palm stalks.
Of this root, عُرْجُون ʿurjūn, occurs once in the Qur’an.

عُرْجُون ʿurjūn [n.] date-palm stalk (36:39) والقمر قدرناه منازل حتى
عاد كالعرجون القديم and the moon, We have set it in phases until it
goes back to being like a [shriveled] old date-palm stalk.
